subject: Re: Media request re Jeffrey Epstein
body:
no question,, there is a report on ghislaine's father this week, and she told roy's office she was writing because of my friendship with prince andrew. but with no comment, she will print the police report. 

----- Original Message ----
From: Alan Dershowitz <dersh@law.harvard.edu>
To: Jeffrey Epstein <JEEProject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Thursday, April 26, 2007 5:53:32 PM
Subject: Re: Media request re Jeffrey Epstein


Let's talk first. I think the journalist has an agenda
Sent via BlackBerry from Cingular Wireless  

-----Original Message-----
From: "J. Epstein" <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Date: Thu, 26 Apr 2007 15:47:40 
To:dersh@law.harvard.edu
Subject: Re: Media request re Jeffrey Epstein

mr epstein took and passed an extensive lie detector test,, the girls making the alegation of police impersonation , refused to do so when asked by the state  to do so under oath, The girls admitted that they had lied , ,mr epstein has plead not guilty . and the charge does in no way suggest a minor was involved.  put them on notice.. Both  The state and the grand jury did not believe the girls,.wealthy poeple are targets ?,, bounce your ideas off of gerry 

----- Original Message ----
From: Alan Dershowitz <dersh@law.harvard.edu>
To: Jeffrey Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Thursday, April 26, 2007 3:49:04 PM
Subject: Fw: Media request re Jeffrey Epstein


Sent via BlackBerry from Cingular Wireless  

-----Original Message-----
From: Sharon.Churcher@mailonsunday.co.uk
Date: Thu, 26 Apr 2007 16:28:55 
To:dersh@law.harvard.edu
Subject: Media request re Jeffrey Epstein


Dear Professor Dershowitz:

I am writing an article about the Palm Beach police investigation of Mr.
Jeffrey Epstein. His lawyer, Jack Goldberger, is on vacation and cannot be
reached.

Would you be able to comment on his behalf?

My questions are as follows:

Did Mr. Epstein engage as alleged in the police affidavit in sexual
activity with any minor or molest any minor or solicit sex from any minor?

Did Mr. Epstein solicit prostitution as charged?

Did investigators working on behalf of Mr. Epstein or his attorneys harrass
or make contact with potential wintnesses in either of the above cases?

Did these investigators pose as police officers?

Did you attempt to discredit the reliability of potential witnesses prior
to or during the grand jury hearing?

My deadline is six pm Friday EST.

I will be most grateful for any assistance you are able to give me.

Sincerely,

Sharon Churcher
Chief American Correspondent
The Mail on Sunday (London)
Office phone: + 1-800-443-8642 or  1-914-669-8802
Cell phone:     +1-914-319-1838
Fax:                   +1-914-6698677
email:              sharon.churcher@mailonsunday.co.uk
